formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Since the chapter 'Transport and Communication' in CBSE Class 12 Geography doesn't involve a lot of mathematical formulas, here are a few key points and concepts that are crucial for the exam:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "The Communication Process",
    "formula": "Sender -> Message -> Channel -> Receiver -> Feedback",
    "variables": "Sender, Message, Channel, Receiver, Feedback",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key concept for understanding communication systems"
  },
  {
    "name": "Factors Affecting Transportation",
    "formula": "Natural Factors: Terrain, Climate, Hydrography, Man-made Factors: Infrastructure, Technology, Economy",
    "variables": "Natural Factors, Man-made Factors",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key points to consider when analyzing transportation systems"
  },
  {
    "name": "Types of Transportation",
    "formula": "Land Transport: Road, Rail, Pipeline; Water Transport: Inland, Coastal, Oceanic; Air Transport: Domestic, International",
    "variables": "Land Transport, Water Transport, Air Transport",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key categories of transportation modes"
  },
  {
    "name": "Types of Communication",
    "formula": "Verbal, Non-Verbal, Written, Visual",
    "variables": "Verbal, Non-Verbal, Written, Visual",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key categories of communication types"
  },
  {
    "name": "The Role of Transport in Economic Development",
    "formula": "Transportation affects the movement of goods, services, and people, influencing economic growth and development",
    "variables": "",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key concept for understanding the relationship between transport and economic development"
  },
  {
    "name": "The Impact of Communication on Society",
    "formula": "Communication affects social, cultural, and economic aspects of society, influencing social change and development",
    "variables": "",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key concept for understanding the relationship between communication and society"
  }
]
```

Please note that these are not mathematical formulas but key concepts and points to be remembered for the chapter 'Transport and Communication' in CBSE Class 12 Geography.
